company_core.name: Novee Security
company_core.description: Novee provides an AI-driven penetration testing platform that uses black-box testing to detect vulnerabilities and attack paths in real-time, mimicking the strategies of actual attackers. The platform leverages purpose-trained AI models that adapt to environmental changes, continuously validating vulnerabilities and offering customized remediation strategies based on the specific technology stack.

founders.background:

He also led a research and development group within the IDF from 2019 to 2021. Gon holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from Reichman University.

founders.name: Ido Geffen
founders.background:
Ido Geffen has over 20 years of experience in cybersecurity, having held significant roles such as VP of Product at Orca Security, where he contributed to revolutionizing cloud security, and VP of Product & Customer Success at Oasis Security, a leader in non-human identity management. He also served as VP of Customer Success & Support at CyberMDX, managing multiple departments to enhance customer journeys. Ido holds a B.Sc. in Computer Science from Ben-Gurion University and an MBA in Management of Technology, Innovation & Entrepreneurship from Tel Aviv University.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/ido-geffen

agent_output.markdown:
# Novee Security | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

## TL;DR
Novee Security is an AI-driven penetration testing platform that uses black-box testing and purpose-trained AI models to detect vulnerabilities and attack paths in real-time, delivering customized remediation strategies based on each customer's technology stack. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811) The company raised a Series A totaling $51.5M, with the last funding closing in January 2026. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)[[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811) Headcount has surged 32.1% in 90 days, signaling aggressive post-funding scaling. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

---

## Why This Meeting Matters
• **Substantial early-stage capital deployed:** $51.5M raised at Series A — an unusually large round for a company founded in 2025 — suggesting strong conviction from lead investors YL Ventures, Zeev Ventures, and Canaan. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)
• **Rapid team expansion:** 32.1% headcount growth in 90 days (current team: 37) indicates active go-to-market and product buildout following the January 2026 close. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)
• **Pedigreed founding team in a high-demand category:** CEO Ido Geffen brings 20+ years of cybersecurity experience including VP-level roles at Orca Security and Oasis Security, directly relevant to the AI security tooling market. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

---

## Company Snapshot
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Founded | 2025 |
| HQ | Not found in table |
| Employees | 37 (+32.1% 90d) |
| Products | AI-driven penetration testing platform using black-box testing and purpose-trained AI models for real-time vulnerability detection and remediation |
| Customers | B2B |
| Total Funding | $51,500,000 |
| Last Round | Series A — January 14, 2026 |

*Last updated: Data retrieved at first snapshot; no historical change data available* [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

---

## Founders

**Gon Chalamish** — Co-Founder & CPO | linkedin.com/in/gon-chalamish-a30966282
Gon Chalamish most recently served as R&D Group Manager at FundGuard (2024–2025). Prior to that, he held senior roles in the Israel Defense Forces, including Deputy Commander Chief of Staff and Project Manager, and led an R&D group within the IDF from 2019 to 2021. He holds a B.Sc. in Computer Science from Reichman University. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

**Ido Geffen** — Co-Founder & CEO | linkedin.com/in/ido-geffen
Ido Geffen brings over 20 years of cybersecurity experience, with VP-level roles at Orca Security (cloud security), Oasis Security (non-human identity management), and CyberMDX (customer success and support). He holds a B.Sc. in Computer Science from Ben-Gurion University and an MBA in Management of Technology, Innovation & Entrepreneurship from Tel Aviv University. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

---

## Key Signals
• **[Hiring]** Headcount up 32.1% in 90 days (to 37 employees) — indicative of post-Series A scaling across product and GTM functions — Source: Novee Security Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)
• **[Funding]** Series A closed January 14, 2026; total raised $51.5M — Source: Novee Security Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

---

## In the News

**No recent news available.** [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)
*Note: No historical change data has been tracked yet; data will be available from first retrieval onward.*

---

## Meeting Prep

**Key questions to ask:**
• The Series A is notably large ($51.5M) for a company founded in 2025 — what milestones or early customer traction justified this valuation and round size, and what does the deployment roadmap look like? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)
• With headcount growing 32.1% in 90 days, what functions are being prioritized in hiring — sales, engineering, or research — and what does the go-to-market motion look like for B2B enterprise customers? [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)
• CEO Ido Geffen's background spans cloud security (Orca) and non-human identity (Oasis) — how does Novee's AI pen testing platform differentiate from or complement existing automated security testing tools, and what is the target customer profile? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/66059811)

**Recommended next step:** Request a product demo and early customer reference calls to validate platform differentiation and assess pipeline maturity ahead of any follow-on diligence.
